subject: L40S卡在PE4(7a), PE5(94)抓不到, 但PE7(78), PE8(e2)可以
issue_description: L40S card cannot be detected at PE4(7a) and PE5(94), but PE7(78) and PE8(e2) are detectable.
log_snippet: Using nvidia-smi. With SR-IOV enabled, PE7 and PE8 can be detected. With SR-IOV disabled, the intended slot coverage fails on PE4 and PE5.
comments: Customer accepts SR-IOV enabled for now. RD needs the GPU card and system for debug. Status was updated from New to Clarifying.
current_config: HW SKY-621V4, FW 1.10 220004EB, L40S installed. Detection result depends on slot mapping and SR-IOV setting.
expected_config: All required GPU slots should detect the L40S card under the intended shipping configuration.
known_context: AE-created bug with limited structured information. Attached mail file mentions MTREK1 slot issue.
reproduction: Use nvidia-smi to compare GPU detection with SR-IOV enabled versus disabled.
test_procedure: 1. Use nvidia-smi to inspect GPU detection. 2. Compare the result under SR-IOV enabled and disabled settings.
workaround: Enable SR-IOV; customer currently accepts the enabled configuration.
evidence: PE4 and PE5 cannot detect the L40S card
SR-IOV enabled is currently accepted as workaround
